  • Uses of Point in geometries.api

    Methods in geometries.api with parameters of type Point
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Vector
    Geometry.getNormal(Point point)
    Returns the normal vector to the geometry at the given point.

  • Uses of Point in geometries.impl

    Methods in geometries.impl with parameters of type Point
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Vector
    Plane.getNormal(Point point)
    Returns the normal vector of the plane.
    Vector
    Polygon.getNormal(Point point)
     
    Vector
    Sphere.getNormal(Point point)
    Returns the normal vector to the sphere at a given point.
    Vector
    Tube.getNormal(Point point)
     
    Constructors in geometries.impl with parameters of type Point
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Plane(Point p1, Point p2, Point p3)
    Constructor using three points on the plane.
     
    Plane(Point point, Vector normal)
    Constructor using a point and a normal vector.
     
    Polygon(Point... vertices)
    Constructs a convex polygon from ordered vertices.
     
    Sphere(Point center, double radius)
    Constructor for sphere.
     
    Triangle(Point p1, Point p2, Point p3)
    Constructs a triangle from three vertices.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Vector
    Class Vector represents a non-zero vector in 3D Cartesian coordinates.
    Fields in primitives declared as Point
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Point
    Point.ZERO
    Constant point representing the origin (0,0,0).
    Methods in primitives that return Point
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Point
    Point.add(Vector vector)
    Adds a vector to this point.
    Point
    Ray.getOrigin()
    Returns the origin point of the ray.
    Methods in primitives with parameters of type Point
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    Point.distance(Point other)
    Calculates the distance between this point and another point.
    double
    Point.distanceSquared(Point other)
    Calculates the squared distance between this point and another point.
    Vector
    Point.subtract(Point other)
    Subtracts another point from this point and returns the vector from the other point to this point.
    Constructors in primitives with parameters of type Point
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Ray(Point origin, Vector direction)
    Constructs a ray with origin point and direction vector.
